title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Kinemon, Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as the Navy presence grows when Admiral Fujitora enters Dressrosa, while the tournament and Doflamingo’s schemes continue to tighten.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, as for what's become of the bridge... only those who've gone can say

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Although I don't know anyone who's returned

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Change the location of the Exchange !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Indeed! The guy you're exchanging agrees!! You fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've come this far, so quit complaining

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Rather than that... What I'm worried about is the current state of this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Even though their King just abdicated... this city is perfectly calm....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Even if it's still a bit soon, this is far from what I expected ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Could... Could they be connected with "CP-9"...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're the highest ranking of the agencies in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: When they appear, you can be sure nothing good is going on

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll be taking my sword and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: OW... Owwtwo this is bad, bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We've really screwed up!! A human saw us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I am but a simple old man, that I am!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
